commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Among you that are able. It may signify, such as are powerful among you, or such as are able by health, and willing. (Witham)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Again accusers, again at Cæsarea, again Paul is brought forth. And having come, immediately he sat on the judgment-seat
